expected_evidence: Verify HLA1516-RULE-001: Federations shall define a FOM documented using the HLA OMT.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-002: Simulation-associated object instance state shall reside in federates rather than the RTI, except standard MOM-managed data.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-003: During execution, exchange of FOM-defined data among joined federates shall occur through RTI services.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-004: Joined federates shall interact with the RTI through the standard HLA federate interface.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-005: An object instance attribute shall be owned by at most one joined federate at a time.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-006: Federates shall define a SOM documented using the HLA OMT.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-007: Federates shall support the update, reflection, sending, or receipt capabilities described in their SOMs.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-008: Federates shall support dynamic ownership transfer or acceptance as described in their SOMs.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-009: Federates shall be able to vary update conditions described in their SOMs.
Verify HLA1516-RULE-010: Federates shall manage local time in a manner compatible with federation time coordination.

Verify HLA1516.1-FM-OVERVIEW-001: RTI shall manage connected, joined, resigned, and disconnected federate lifecycle states.
Verify HLA1516.1-FM-OVERVIEW-002: RTI shall maintain the current FDD as FOM modules and the standard MIM are accepted.
Verify HLA1516.1-FM-OVERVIEW-003: RTI shall detect and handle lost federates according to federation-management rules.
Verify HLA1516.1-DM-OVERVIEW-004: RTI shall track object and interaction publication declarations per joined federate.
Verify HLA1516.1-DM-OVERVIEW-005: RTI shall track object and interaction subscription declarations per joined federate.
Verify HLA1516.1-OM-OVERVIEW-006: RTI shall discover object instances at subscribed federates when discovery conditions are satisfied.
Verify HLA1516.1-OM-OVERVIEW-007: RTI shall determine instance attribute scope from subscription, DDM, and object-class relevance state.
Verify HLA1516.1-OWN-OVERVIEW-008: RTI shall track instance-attribute ownership so that no attribute has more than one owner.
Verify HLA1516.1-TM-OVERVIEW-009: RTI shall coordinate logical time advancement with ordered delivery of timestamped messages.
Verify HLA1516.1-TM-OVERVIEW-010: RTI shall enforce lookahead constraints for time-regulating federates.
Verify HLA1516.1-TM-OVERVIEW-011: RTI shall compute and expose GALT and LITS values according to time-management semantics.
Verify HLA1516.1-DDM-OVERVIEW-012: RTI shall use FDD dimensions and region overlap to determine DDM relevance.
Verify HLA1516.1-SUP-OVERVIEW-013: RTI shall provide stable handle/name lookup services for FDD elements and federation instances.
Verify HLA1516.1-MOM-OVERVIEW-014: RTI shall expose standard management information through MOM object and interaction classes.
Verify HLA1516.1-MOM-OVERVIEW-015: RTI shall publish standard MOM object classes and maintain MOM federation/federate object instances.
Verify HLA1516.1-MOM-OVERVIEW-016: RTI shall process standard MOM request, adjustment, report, and service interactions according to their role.
Verify HLA1516.1-MOM-OVERVIEW-017: RTI shall emit service-reporting information when service reporting is enabled.
Verify HLA1516.2-COMPONENTS-001: Parser shall recognize the standard OMT component tables used by HLA object models.
Verify HLA1516.2-IDENTITY-002: Parser shall extract and preserve object-model identification metadata.
Verify HLA1516.2-TYPE-003: Validator shall distinguish FOM, SOM, FOM module, SOM module, and MIM-style model roles where applicable.
Verify HLA1516.2-OBJECT-CLASSES-004: Parser shall preserve the object class hierarchy rooted at ObjectRoot.
Verify HLA1516.2-OBJECT-CLASSES-005: Validator shall reject invalid object-class inheritance or duplicate class definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-INTERACTION-CLASSES-006: Parser shall preserve the interaction class hierarchy rooted at InteractionRoot.
Verify HLA1516.2-INTERACTION-CLASSES-007: Validator shall reject invalid interaction-class inheritance or duplicate class definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-ATTRIBUTES-008: Parser shall preserve class-attribute metadata including datatype, update, transportation, order, dimension, sharing, and semantics fields.
Verify HLA1516.2-ATTRIBUTES-009: Validator shall ensure attributes reference valid classes, datatypes, transportation types, order types, dimensions, and update rates.
Verify HLA1516.2-PARAMETERS-010: Parser shall preserve interaction-parameter metadata including datatype and semantics fields.
Verify HLA1516.2-PARAMETERS-011: Validator shall ensure parameters reference valid interaction classes and datatypes.
Verify HLA1516.2-DIMENSIONS-012: Parser shall preserve dimension metadata used for DDM routing.
Verify HLA1516.2-DIMENSIONS-013: Validator shall ensure attributes and interaction classes reference only defined dimensions.
Verify HLA1516.2-TIME-014: Parser shall preserve logical-time representation metadata.
Verify HLA1516.2-TAGS-015: Parser shall preserve user-supplied tag representation metadata.
Verify HLA1516.2-SYNC-016: Parser shall preserve synchronization point declarations.
Verify HLA1516.2-TRANSPORTATION-017: Parser shall preserve transportation type definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-UPDATE-RATE-018: Parser shall preserve update-rate designator definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-SWITCHES-019: Parser shall preserve switch declarations.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-BASIC-020: Parser shall preserve basic datatype definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-SIMPLE-021: Parser shall preserve simple datatype aliases and validate their base datatype references.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-ENUM-022: Parser shall preserve enumerated datatypes and their enumerator values.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-ARRAY-023: Parser shall preserve fixed and variable array datatype definitions.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-FIXED-RECORD-024: Parser shall preserve fixed record datatype field ordering and field datatype references.
Verify HLA1516.2-DATATYPES-VARIANT-025: Parser shall preserve variant record discriminants, alternatives, and datatype references.
Verify HLA1516.2-NOTES-026: Parser and serializer shall preserve notes associated with OMT elements.
Verify HLA1516.2-LEXICON-027: Object model documentation shall support FOM/SOM lexicon definition tables.
Verify HLA1516.2-CONFORMANCE-028: Validator shall classify OMT conformance against supported conformance labels and verification rules.
Verify HLA1516.2-MERGE-029: Merger shall combine FOM/SOM modules according to standard module merging rules.
Verify HLA1516.2-NORMALIZATION-030: Implementation shall support common normalization functions required for DDM dimension values.
Verify HLA1516.2-MERGE-PRINCIPLES-031: Merger shall apply the normative module merging principles when composing object models.
Verify HLA1516.2-XML-DIF-032: Parser and serializer shall support the OMT data interchange format.
Verify HLA1516.2-XML-SCHEMA-033: Validator shall reject OMT XML documents that do not conform to the OMT XML schema.
